description_long: This is a rectangular, soft-sided package of Møllerens UR-kraft Lettkokte Havregryn, a type of quick-cooking oat flakes. The front of the package features bold black and brown text, a stylized logo, and an image of oat grains, with additional information about the product's whole grain content and natural qualities. The back side provides preparation instructions, nutritional information, and a description of the product's benefits, all printed in Norwegian. One side of the package displays a large grayscale portrait of a bearded man, adding a distinctive visual element. The top of the package is sealed and colored in a muted brown, contrasting with the predominantly light gray and white body. The packaging appears to be made of a flexible, matte-finished paper or plastic laminate, typical for food products like oats.
description: A soft, rectangular package of Møllerens UR-kraft quick-cooking oats with bold branding, oat imagery, and a grayscale portrait on one side.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, product name, oat imagery, and key product information in bold text.
description_view_1: This side view displays the nutritional facts panel, ingredients list, and additional product details in smaller text.
description_view_2: The back view features preparation instructions, a product description, and branding, all in Norwegian text.
description_view_3: This side view is dominated by a large grayscale portrait of a bearded man, with minimal text and branding.
attribute_brand_logo: The Møllerens logo is visible at the top front of the package, shaped as a curved rectangle with white text on a dark background.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the side of the package, including a nutrition facts panel and ingredient list.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A large grayscale portrait of a bearded man is printed on one side of the package, serving as a distinctive visual element.
